title: SecurityPulse
intent: Code and dependency security posture tracking with policy-enforced remediation
requirements: scans module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
findings module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
policies module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
remediation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
risk-trends module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
exceptions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
